title: Marketplace Manager - Ecom Express - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ecom Express - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
